case_title: BROOKS, ERIN E. vs. GEORDY'S RESTAURANT, INC. A CALIF. CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROOKS, ERIN E. AS TO DEFENDANT GEORDY'S RESTAURANT, INC. A CALIF. CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROOKS, ERIN E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORDY'S RESTAURANT, INC. A CALIF. CORP. $1,289.22 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,369.22
